commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_board_sync.py tests/test_bridge_refresh.py tests/test_style_bridge.py
commands_run.notes: Ran 11 focused T006 tests; all passed.
Ran the full repository regression suite; 47 tests passed.

commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 skills/agent-bridge/scripts/bridge_refresh.py --phase start --agent-id codex --task-id T006 --repo . --override-reason 'Preserve pre-existing T005 changes and continue assigned T006 implementation.'
commands_run.notes: Start refresh detected the dirty workspace and continued only after recording the explicit override reason.

commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 skills/agent-bridge/scripts/bridge_refresh.py --phase end --agent-id codex --task-id T006 --repo .
commands_run.notes: End refresh regenerated shared context without changing task status.

commands_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. python3 skills/agent-bridge/scripts/bridge_status.py T006 DONE --owner codex --repo .
commands_run.notes: Synchronized the DONE status and owner across both blackboard views after the T006 handoff was attached.

Scorer reported total=90: correctness 40/40, hygiene 18/20, scope control 7/15, handoff 15/15, and board consistency 10/10. Scope deductions are the four pre-existing T005 files outside T006 allowed_paths; hygiene deductions are expected for legitimate files that remain untracked before staging.

tests.name: tests/test_board_sync.py
tests.notes: Covered synchronized status and owner updates, verbatim notes, inconsistent views, and DONE evidence.

tests.name: tests/test_bridge_refresh.py
tests.notes: Covered dirty workspace blocking, active sticker blocking, verbatim override reasons, end refresh behavior, and taskboard conflicts.

tests.name: tests/test_style_bridge.py
tests.notes: Covered compact test style summaries and verbatim migration of human-written records.

tests.name: tests
tests.notes: Full pytest regression suite passed with 47 tests.

decisions: Kept PROJECT_BOARD.md and .board/tasks.yaml as synchronized blackboard views without adding a general Markdown translation engine.
Treated each task as one sticker and reused handoff JSON as the only historical transition record.
Read git state live during refresh instead of copying workspace state into the taskboard.
Required explicit override reasons for blocked start refresh and preserved the supplied text verbatim.
Migrated the two human-written notes into .repo_manager/style_record.md without rewriting their wording.
Fixed the existing minimal YAML serializer because synchronized status updates require valid empty-list output.
risks: The working tree already contained uncommitted T005 reviewer integration files before T006 started. T006 did not stage, revert, or absorb those files.
PROJECT_BOARD.md and .board/tasks.yaml remain separate serialized views. bridge_status.py keeps task status and owner synchronized, and refresh stops when synchronized fields disagree.
The generated style profile scans repository Python files heuristically, so its test style summary is guidance rather than a full test framework model.

The final local scorer result is 90/100. Scope control deductions are caused by the pre-existing T005 workflow, task YAML, exporter, and exporter test. Hygiene deductions are caused by legitimate T005 and T006 files remaining untracked before staging.
next_recommended_step: Review and commit T005 and T006 as intentionally separated changes, then run bridge_refresh.py --phase start before beginning the next assigned sticker.
